title: hieracium solidagineum subsp. webbianum
intro: Hieracium solidagineum subsp. webbianum, also known as Webbian Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium solidagineum subsp. webbianum include its ability to stimulate the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote the healing of wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
